three_layers.name: Mersenne ladder
three_layers.inputs: BST primary exponents {rank, N_c, n_C, g, c_2, c_3, seesaw}
three_layers.output: 6 of 7 BST primaries are Mersenne-prime exponents + substrate-natural exclusion forms

three_layers.name: Cross-Cartan three-pillar
three_layers.inputs: Hermitian symmetric domains (Cartan classification) + (α, churn, c_FK) observables
three_layers.output: D_IV⁵ uniquely tight via additional substrate primaries (N_c, chi, seesaw)

three_layers.name: Joint experimental selection
three_layers.inputs: Physical observables (α⁻¹ = 137, m_p/m_e = 6π⁵, Casimir spectrum = C_2 = 6)
three_layers.mathematical_structure: BST primary forms vs experimental measurements
three_layers.output: D_IV⁵ at dim_C=5, rank=2 jointly forced by all three observables
